CORPORATE CONNECTS

PAN INDIA

OPERATIONS

18 Years of Experience

We Help you Define your Own Future and Make It Happen!

SMART Training Resources is the pioneer in Placement Training and the largest career development company in India. SMART has trained 1.7 million students pan India on relevant Employability Skills like Language & Communication Skills, IT Skills, Life Skills and Aptitude Skills to enhance their overall “Employability Quotient” and transform them into “ready to deploy” talent mapped to industry requirements.

What make smart the leaders?

01

Subject-Specific Specialist Trainers

02

Dedicated R&D; Team for Continuous Analysis and Upgrade

03

Up-to-date Relevant Courseware Aligned to industry trends

04

State-of-the-art test tools

05

Continued online student engagement beyond training

06

Rigorous feedback mechanism

Quality Delivery

99.99% error free courseware
Right faculty mix of veterans and young blood
Rigorous feedback mechanism
Professional online test support

Abundant Course Options

Around 20 programme variants
Seamless update for recruitment evolution every year

Widespread Operations

Delivered training in 750+ colleges across India
Customization for specific requirements
End-to-end training solutions

Brand Reputation

Institutions Patronized by top colleges
Students Retail training at specific locations
Companies Corporate training, Train and deploy projects

ABOUT US

A journey that began in the year 2002 has seen SMART grow from being the pioneers to the leaders of placement training nationwide.

During this period SMART has touched the lives of over 1.7+ million students in over 750+ colleges across India.

SMART is a well-recognized brand among students, training & placement offices of higher education institutions and corporate. SMART is the name to reckon with in the business of placement-oriented training and recruitment services.

WHAT PEOPLE SAY ABOUT US

I am really happy to note that you are doing a wonderful service to the engineering society and helping the young engineers to elevate themselves to become employable. This would mean that many families are being benefitted. Smart is good platform.

R Sridhar / (General Manager) Global Media Solutions, Tata Communications

Appreciate the great initiative.

Shashikanth Jayaraman / (Head HR) TVS Automobile Solutions

Excellent program. Nice to come here and appreciate the good work done. Keep it up.

Stanley George / (Head HR) Hexaware Technologies

Refer a Friend

Want to receive a Laptop? It’s easy if you know someone who could benefit from a SMART Training. All you have to do is refer them to us! After your referral has been enrolled for 30 days, you will receive this gift. Only one referral laptop per year is permissible
